# Leonid Saidulin — Product Lead

> Product Lead working across B2B SaaS, PropTech, Voice AI, utility billing, customer research, and AI-enabled product operations.

## Primary content

- [Full AI-readable portfolio](https://leonidsaidulin-netizen.github.io/leonid-saidulin-portfolio/portfolio.md): product process, My Dom Online cases, metrics, annual strategy review, leadership, and AI automation.
- [Visual bilingual portfolio](https://leonidsaidulin-netizen.github.io/leonid-saidulin-portfolio/): Russian and English interactive website.
- [MDO strategy 2026–2028](https://leonidsaidulin-netizen.github.io/mdo-strategy-2026/): public Russian-language strategy presentation covering the business audit, research, product priorities, financial model, KPI system, and execution plan.
- [English resume](https://leonidsaidulin-netizen.github.io/leonid-saidulin-portfolio/assets/leonid_saidulin_product_resume_en.docx)
- [Russian resume](https://leonidsaidulin-netizen.github.io/leonid-saidulin-portfolio/assets/leonid_saidulin_product_resume_ru.docx)
